sample_questions: Tell me about yourself in 2 minutes
Give an example of working in a multicultural team
Why the one-year format vs. two-year MBA?
How do you handle rapid change?
red_flags: Lack of international experience or curiosity
tips: INSEAD values diversity above all - highlight cross-cultural experiences.
Be clear about why you prefer the intensive one-year format.
Know that INSEAD has campuses in Fontainebleau, Singapore, and Abu Dhabi.
